sessionStart.bash: if [ -f .planning/STATE.md ]; then printf '%s' '{"additionalContext":"GSD: .planning/STATE.md present - review the current phase and any blockers before acting."}'; else printf '%s' '{"additionalContext":"GSD: no .planning/ workflow found - run /gsd-new-project to start a tracked workflow."}'; fi
sessionStart.powershell: if (Test-Path .planning/STATE.md) { '{"additionalContext":"GSD: .planning/STATE.md present - review the current phase and any blockers before acting."}' } else { '{"additionalContext":"GSD: no .planning/ workflow found - run /gsd-new-project to start a tracked workflow."}' }
